name: retaining-wall-karte-editor
description: Railway retaining wall inspection PWA & native app

scripts.build: mkdir -p www && cp index.html www/ && cp manifest.json www/ 2>/dev/null; cp icon-*.png www/ 2>/dev/null; cp service-worker.js www/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
